final:
module top_module(anti_inValue, outValue);input [7:0] anti_inValue;
output reg [7:0] outValue; // Changed wire to reg

// add 1 to anti_inValue using an adder
always @ (anti_inValue)
begin
    if (anti_inValue == 8'hFF) // if anti_inValue is at maximum value
        outValue = 8'h00; // wrap around to 0
    else
        outValue = anti_inValue + 1; // increment by 1
end

endmodule
